c-001.title: BMW 320d Touring M Sport
c-001.description: Well-maintained 320d Touring with M Sport package, Professional Navigation and LED headlights. Ideal for family and business use.

c-002.title: Mercedes-Benz GLC 300 4MATIC
c-002.description: Comfortable SUV with 4MATIC, MBUX and a generous boot. Smooth ride for daily driving and travel.

c-003.title: VW Golf 8 GTI
c-003.description: Sporty GTI with DSG, IQ.Light and digital cockpit, low mileage with full service history.

c-004.title: Audi A5 Sportback 40 TDI quattro
c-004.description: Elegant Sportback with quattro all-wheel drive, Matrix LED and Bang & Olufsen sound.

t-001.title: Mercedes-Benz Actros 1845 LS GigaSpace
t-001.description: Excellent Mercedes-Benz Actros with GigaSpace cab. Ideal for long-distance haulage. Full dealer service history.

t-002.title: Volvo FH 500 Globetrotter XL
t-002.description: Powerful Volvo FH 500 with the spacious Globetrotter XL cab. Maximum driver comfort and excellent fuel efficiency.

t-003.title: Scania R 450 Highline
t-003.description: Nearly new Scania R 450 with Highline cab. Premium build quality and a proven, economical 13-litre engine.

t-004.title: MAN TGX 18.510 XXL
t-004.description: Reliable MAN TGX with large XXL cab. Perfect for long tours and demanding transport work.

t-005.title: Ford F-Max 500 Mega
t-005.description: The innovative Ford F-Max offers excellent value. Spacious interior and modern driver assistance systems.
